title: Nishir Daak
subTitle: Tara is being prepared for the sacrifice but her mother Chitra is determined to not let her die. She starts a fire to distract everyone and escapes with Tara. Will they find their way out and escape unharmed?

title: Shiv Shakti
subTitle: Martand performs 'nag panchami puja' after he stops villagers from killing the snake. Later, Vasuki blesses Martand and Mhalsa by forming a divine circle around them.

title: Sadhak Bamakhyapa
subTitle: Bamakhyapa, a saint living in the 18th century, is a great devotee of Goddess Tara. Though he is against the unconventional orthodox temple practices, he uses his divine powers to help the needy.

title: Swapnodana
subTitle: In an effort to create chaos in the house on the occasion of Simran's wedding, Jasmine abducts Candy. Will Fateh and Tejo retrieve Candy before it is too late?
